scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: npm run build:prisma && npm run build --prefix client
